# Iron Spike

Iron Spikes come in bundles of ten. As a [[utilize]] action, you can use a blunt object, such as a [[light_hammer]], to hammer a spike into wood, earth, or a similar material. You can do so to jam a door shut or to then tie a [[rope]] or [[chain]] to the Spike.
